required_groups.description: The poem 'How doth the little crocodile' recited by Alice
The Mouse's long and sad tale
The poem 'You Are Old, Father William' recited by Alice
The lullaby 'Speak roughly to your little boy' sung by the Duchess
The song/poem 'Twinkle, twinkle, little bat' sung by the Hatter
The Lobster Quadrille song performed by the Mock Turtle
The altered poem 'Tis the Voice of the Sluggard' recited by Alice
The song 'Beautiful Soup' sung by the Mock Turtle
The tart accusation rhyme/poem read by the White Rabbit
The trial verse/poem 'They told me you had been to her' read by the White Rabbit
